name: Ego Jinpachi
description:
futbolista!ego x athletic trainer! reader

————— ୨୧ —————

Ever since you started your internship as an athletic trainer for France’s beloved futbol club PXG, you’ve built good bonds with a good majority of the players after working with them for a while. Though, one of the players was like a mystery to you. Ego Jinpachi.

Well, it’s like the Goddess of fortune was tuned into your thoughts, because right when you started to wonder about him, guess who walked into the room?
